calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-06-2010 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Centerstone Realty, represented by agent Ron Erickson.
Jenna Yott, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant(s): Alejandra Flores and Esteban Hernandez.
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem: Amanda Ebey, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions in Dept. 304-B.
The parties enter into a signed agreement "Stipulation for entry of Judgment or Dismissal with prejudice", which was filed.
Case settled and matter is taken off the TRIAL calendar.
